title: 美國重災區: 紐約州長 民望大升

replies.msg:
係武漢肺炎下, 歐美大部分國家政府和地區政府也民望大升.

美國疫情最重災區是紐約, 但紐約州長Andrew Cuomo依然民望大升.

美國Siena College民調:
- 紐約州長Andrew Cuomo的支持度急升至71%. (自2013年以來最高民望.)
- Andrew Cuomo係民主黨黨員, 但有70%共和黨支持者都認可Andrew Cuomo的抗疫表現.


https://www.foxnews.com/politics/cuomos-approval-rating-surges-poll

Published 14 hours ago
Cuomo’s approval rating surges amid coronavirus crisis: poll
By Paul Steinhauser | Fox News

Eighty-seven percent of registered voters in New York state say they approve of the job he’s doing steering the state’s efforts in combating the crisis, according to a Siena College poll released Monday. Even 70 percent of Republicans in New York give Cuomo a thumbs-up on the job he’s doing.
....
The governor’s efforts dealing with the coronavirus outbreak have also boosted his overall approval rating, which jumped 27 percentage points in just a month to 71 percent, his highest level since 2013 in Siena polling.

德國執政黨與美國Trump 亦民望大升

意大利總理 民望大升
https://lihkg.com/thread/1948421/page/1

quote.msg: 應該得香港民望跌

replies.msg:
咁樣, 基本上可以話係無升

https://hd.stheadline.com/news/realtime/hk/1733502/

中大香港亞太研究所公布3月份的特區政府民望電話調查結果，顯示市民對政府表現的滿意度、特首、3位司長表現評分，以至對特區政府和中央政府的信任度，與1月份比較有輕微上升。但若與去年3月份比較，則跌幅顯著。

根據民調結果，受訪市民對特首林鄭月娥整體表現的評分為25分，較1月份的評分上升1.6分。若與去年3月的53分作比較，跌幅甚為顯著。
